name: BBNJ / High Seas Treaty Corpus
tagline: A neutral, authoritative, machine-readable record of the law of marine biodiversity beyond national jurisdiction — built provenance-first. Every text carries its source, retrieval date, official citation, authentic languages, an authoritative-status flag and a content hash; every change is a new dated version. Source texts are official UN documents; structure and concept tags are derived, unofficial and clearly labelled.
